[[File:Ultimate Up Pack Details.png|300px]]

The {{RewardIconWithLink|Ultimate Up Pack|orange}} is a reward for many events that gives you a choice of what you want.

* {{RewardIconWithGearlink|orange|Material|Blasphemy Eye}}
* {{RewardIconWithGearlink|orange|Material|Crystal of Will}}
* {{RewardIconWithGearlink|orange|Material|Demon God Crystal}}
* {{RewardIconWithGearlink|orange|Material|Eye of Horus}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|Glue, +500}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +6k}}

After receiving the Gift Pack, you may choose one of the above rewards!

[[Category:Reward Pack]]
